addition.item: Animation - Transform settings - New era animation
Parallax background effect for background images and videos
Add feature Tab visibility for individual tabs

fix.item: Fixes the issue where submenus cannot be selected in some cases.
Fixes issue conflict js with JCE Editor
Fixes issue First Menu-item not reaction when clicking on it
Fixes issue old data is not valid
Fixes the issue of aligning items when displaying menus in the module.
Fixes issue Astroid Mega Menu: Joomla Module page exceptions display multi time

change.item: Update the Field structure to conform to Joomla 6 standards
Update style of article edit layout in Dark mode
Update Menu Module to compatible with J6
Update the Field structure to conform to Joomla 6 standards.
